zh.lifeSummary: 當Margarethe Marschall von Mockritz於1430年出生在薩辛斯達爾書額費爾德時，她的父親Heinrich Marschall von Mockritz41歲，母親von Koeckritz36歲。她和Jan von Schoenfeld至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於大約1500年在她的家鄉享年71歲。

nameMeanings.name: Marschall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Erwin, Hedwig, Juergen, Reinhard, Theresia, Wilfried.

German: occupational name for a man in the service of a member of the nobility, originally one who looked after the horses, Middle High German marschalc (from mar(c) ‘noble horse’ + schalk ‘servant’). In time the term came to be used for a military rank or a certain court official. Compare Marshall .
English: variant of   Marshall  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Marshall
meanings: English: usually an occupational name ‘farrier’, occasionally a status name ‘chief official of a royal household or court; a high officer of state’, from Middle English mareshal and Old French maresc(h)al. An even wider range of meanings is found in some other languages: compare for example Polish Marszałek (see Marszalek ). This name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century. It is also borne by Jews, presumably as an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Margarethe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: When Margarethe Marschall von Mockritz was born in 1430, in Schönfeld, Stendal, Saxony, her father, Heinrich Marschall von Mockritz, was 41 and her mother, von Koeckritz, was 36. She had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Jan von Schoenfeld. She died about 1500, in her hometown, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margarethe Marschall von Mockritz est née en 1430, à Schönfeld, Stendal, Sachsen, son père, Heinrich Marschall von Mockritz, avait 41 ans et sa mère, von Koeckritz, avait 36 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Jan von Schoenfeld. Elle est décédée environ 1500, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margarethe Marschall von Mockritz 1430 in Schönfeld, Stendal, Sachsen geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Heinrich Marschall von Mockritz 41 und ihre Mutter von Koeckritz 36. Sie hatte mit Jan von Schoenfeld mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1500 im Alter von 71 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Jan von Schoenfeld. Morì circa 1500, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 71 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Margarethe Marschall von Mockritz(이)가 1430년 작센 스텐다 슈o펠드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Heinrich Marschall von Mockritz(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 von Koeckritz(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 Jan von Schoenfeld(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1500년 그녀의 고향에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margarethe Marschall von Mockritz родилась в 1430 г. в местности щoнфелд, стендаль, сачсен, её отцу по имени Heinrich Marschall von Mockritz было 41 год, а матери, которую звали von Koeckritz, 36. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Jan von Schoenfeld. Она умерла около 1500 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 71 год.
